Feedback Form

Your feedback will be sent to the developers of the Fencing Time Live website. If you have feedback about a specific tournament (such as live results not being updated), please speak with the the computer operators at the event.
Is your feedback about a mistake in a fencer's name, club affiliation, rating or ranking? Or an incorrect score? If so, please DO NOT CONTACT US - we are unable to fix these problems. The information on the Fencing Time Live website is provided to us by the tournament organizers. Errors such as the ones listed can only be corrected by the tournament organizer, so please direct your comment to that person or the Bout Committee if at the tournament venue.
